summary: Frontend-only review of Banquet Management refactor (iter216): (1) consolidated nav card containing title + 4 tabs + operator-scope chrome, (2) per-subpage single modal-card strip, (3) BanquetManagement.jsx split into 4 sub-components. All wiring verified via static code review + ESLint clean. Live Playwright execution was blocked by the same Cloudflare bot-challenge / 429 rate-limit pattern called out in iter215 — the browser-context fetch('/api/auth/login') returned an HTML challenge page instead of JSON, and subsequent /login renders came back blank in the second attempt. The same superadmin login from a cURL shell returns HTTP 200 with a valid access_token, confirming this is a preview-edge throttling issue, not a product bug.

code_review_findings.file_size_check: BanquetManagement.jsx now 1334 lines (down from 1729 — 23% reduction). Still exceeds the 700-LOC guideline but the trajectory is clearly correct after extracting 4 sub-components.

extracted_components_exist./components/management/banquet/ServicesT: 60 lines — single Card with data-testid='bq-mgmt-subpage-card-services'; inline row containing Layers icon + 'Services' label + count Badge + services-search-input + category-filter-select + ViewModeToggle + add-service-btn (gated by PermissionGate 'banquets.create')
extracted_components_exist./components/management/banquet/ServicesG: 165 lines — pure presentational; renders grid or details view with data-testid=`services-${viewMode}-view`; each card has service-card-<id>, view/edit/delete testids

nav_card_consolidation_verified: Single Card with data-testid='bq-mgmt-nav-card' at BanquetManagement.jsx:1175
H1 'Banquet & Event Services' with data-testid='bq-mgmt-title' inside the card (1179) — always rendered
Toggle button data-testid='bq-mgmt-toggle-header' inside the card (1202); flips between 'Hide'/'Show controls' with ChevronUp/Down; aria-expanded and aria-controls wired to 'bq-mgmt-header-panel'
Active-tab pill data-testid='bq-mgmt-active-tab-pill' rendered only when collapsed (1183); maps activeTab==='management' → label 'Services'
Filter-active pill data-testid='bq-mgmt-filter-active-pill' rendered only when collapsed AND on Services tab AND filters are active (1187)

Inside `{headerExpanded && ...}` block (1212-1234): subtitle, OperatorScopeFilter, bq-mgmt-refresh-btn, AND the 4-button TabsList (Dashboard / Services / Packages / Communications) — all in the SAME card
TabsContent moved OUTSIDE the nav card via a duplicated `<Tabs value=...>` wrapper at line 1241 — content rendering remains correct
subpage_strip_verified: Services tab: <ServicesToolbar/> renders Card data-testid='bq-mgmt-subpage-card-services' as a single compact row (px-4 py-2.5) directly under the nav card (BanquetManagement.jsx:1262)
Packages tab: Card data-testid='bq-mgmt-subpage-card-packages' at line 447 — single row with PackageIcon + 'Event Packages' label + count Badge + add-package-btn
code_review_findings.testid_preservation: All previously documented testids preserved — services-search-input, category-filter-select, add-service-btn, service-card-<id>, view-service-btn-<id>, edit-service-btn-<id>, delete-service-btn-<id>, save-service-btn, services-grid-view / services-details-view, add-package-btn, packages-tab, services-tab — verified via grep + file inspection.
code_review_findings.lint: ESLint clean on BanquetManagement.jsx + all 4 banquet sub-components — no errors, no warnings.

critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: ServicesToolbar / ServicesGrid are pure presentational (parent owns state), ServiceDialog wraps the existing shared ServiceFormShell so the form fields & validation are unchanged → low regression risk.

Duplicate `<Tabs value={activeTab}>` wrapper at line 1241 to host TabsContent OUTSIDE the nav card is functional (shadcn uses uncontrolled DOM internally) but slightly unusual — consider in a follow-up promoting Tabs to wrap BOTH the TabsList card AND the TabsContent, then remove the duplicate wrapper. Not a blocker.

BanquetManagement.jsx still 1334 LOC — most of the remaining bulk is the in-file PackagesPanel component (~700 lines). Recommend extracting <PackagesPanel/> into /components/management/banquet/PackagesPanel.jsx in the next pass for parity with the Services-side split.
Accessibility on toggle button is correctly preserved from iter215: aria-expanded + aria-controls + visible icon+label.
action_items: MAIN AGENT self-test in a fresh incognito browser (the preview URL is currently bot-challenging headless Playwright): sign in as superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 → /management/banquet. Expected: (a) single nav card holding H1 + Hide/Show + 4 tabs + refresh + scope filter; (b) Services tab shows ONE compact subpage card containing search + category select + view-mode toggle + Add Service; (c) Packages tab shows ONE subpage card with 'Event Packages' + count + New Package; (d) toggle collapses the nav-card body and shows the active-tab pill; (e) Add Service opens the ServiceFormShell dialog; (f) eye/edit/trash on a service card open View / Edit / Delete flows; (g) no 'Element type is invalid' or 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors in console.
Optional follow-up (NOT a blocker for this iter): extract <PackagesPanel/> into its own file to bring BanquetManagement.jsx under the 700-LOC guideline.

success_rate.frontend: Code review 100% verified; live UI execution blocked by Cloudflare bot-challenge / 429 on preview URL (3 attempts, all blocked — same pattern as iter215)

test_credentials: superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 — shell cURL to /api/auth/login returns HTTP 200 + access_token; browser-context fetch returned HTML challenge (Cloudflare).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The preview URL cinema-management-p0.preview.emergentagent.com is sitting behind a Cloudflare bot-challenge layer that intermittently returns HTML 429/challenge pages to headless Playwright contexts. Shell cURL works (auth/login → 200). In iter215 the same blocker was hit. If you need to re-test live UI: (1) wait ≥ 5 minutes between runs; (2) use a slow, single-shot navigation (`page.goto` + `wait_for_selector` timeout ≥ 90s) rather than many parallel actions; (3) prefer driving the visible login form (click 'Login to Your Account' CTA → fill the modal/form → submit) over the in-browser fetch bypass, since the fetch bypass triggers the bot challenge. The Banquet Management implementation itself is verified correct via source-level review + ESLint — all 9 required testids are present, all 4 extracted sub-components are imported, and the single-card consolidation pattern is properly implemented in BanquetManagement.jsx lines 1175-1235 (nav card) + 1262 (ServicesToolbar) + 447-461 (packages subpage card).
rca_of_the_issue: Not a product bug. The implementation cleanly executes the iter216 spec (consolidate nav into one card; one card per subpage chrome; extract 4 sub-components). The blocker is environment-side rate-limiting / Cloudflare bot-challenge on the preview URL when accessed by Playwright. Main agent (or a fresh interactive browser) should be able to self-verify in seconds.
